dialogues.name: MATT HAITCH
dialogues.text: Hey everybody, it's Haitch, and welcome to the latest installment of Dune Pod, your one stop shop to get ready for the new Dune movie. Or just talking about great movies if you don't care about Dune. This week I'm joined as always by my co-host Jason.

dialogues.name: JASON
dialogues.text: I've never had a fight so bad I had to leave with no pants.

dialogues.name: MATT HAITCH
dialogues.text: And by comic book writer and artist, Mikey P.

dialogues.name: MIKEY P
dialogues.text: An equation is like a symphony, it's erotic.

dialogues.name: MATT HAITCH
dialogues.text: On this episode, we discussed the 1997 classic that launched the Baron Harkonnen himself, Stellan Skarsgård's career, Good Will Hunting. We cover the amazing behind the scenes story of making this film, exceptional achievements in accent work, and just how much we still ache over losing Robin Williams. If you're enjoying the show, check out our Discord server where you can hang out with us whenever you want. And join our live recordings. A link is in the show notes. And now without further a-Dune, Good Will Hunting. [Dune Pod theme song ramps up, plays alone, fades out]

dialogues.text: So our dog Phoebe was out with her dog walker. And she was at the beach. That's where they go. And she bolted from the dog walker and I got a call, like, I noticed that she wasn't home yet. It was like 4:45, I was like, oh, it's weird. And I got a call from her. And the dog walker was like ''She ran, she ran into the ocean. I don't know where she is, she wasn't wearing her tag.'' [Mikey laughs] And the tag things my fault for sure. Like I switched harnesses and like didn't switch to the tag. And so I'm like, Oh no, she's just like out there at the beach. Like not which is not close to where we live in San Francisco. It's like three miles away at least. And so I was just like, okay, I'm gonna come out there and like look for with you. She's like, ''I've already called the animal control. I've done several loops. I can't find her. I don't know where she is.'' Anyway.

And then I get a phone call from the chip people because she got found by the cops like several miles from the beach.

dialogues.text: Wow!

But these guys great, shout out to them.

I've never tried to tip a cop, but I've tipped other people and they didn't like it. I decided they wouldn't like to be tipped. Anyway, Phoebe's fine, she's super tired. She walked like five miles. dialogues.name: MATT HAITCH
dialogues.text: Alright, here we go. [music from Good Will Hunting fades in] Good Will Hunting is the journey to find our place in the world and the nerve to seize it. Will Hunting is a genius hiding in the shadows, gifted with perfect recall and staggering deductive reasoning. He spends his days working as a janitor at MIT, and his nights drinking with his pals from Southie. Bailed out of trouble by a gifted math professor who sees his true potential will is paired with an unconventional therapist, Sean, they will challenge each other, as they each work to uncover the truths about themselves. They have been unwilling to face with Sean's help, can Will accept himself and embrace his destiny so that he can truly become Good Will Hunting? [Mikey laughs]

And then as I was researching this movie, I was like, why is the movie called Good Will Hunting? And like, some people, you know, smart people, smarter than me quickly pointed out, that like, it also means goodwill, like, you know, you're hunting for goodwill, which makes sense, you know, he's looking for he's looking for goodwill from other people. However, I will say this, my own headcanon version of the title, like I had put the punctuation somewhere else, where it was like the Will who is a good person out hunting, like with a rifle, and I don't know what in my brain I thought that meant, because like, it doesn't actually make sense in the movie. But that was like the second meaning that I had sort of gone with for this movie.

He's one of the kids in MIT class and they say can we please use your title? I don't know what arrangement they did but somebody else's title. Yeah. And they named them Will Hunting because of that title.
